name: Hierarchy — University Research Organization Chart
input: Show the organizational hierarchy of a university research institute. Vice President of Research at top, reporting to them: Dean of Medicine, Dean of Engineering, Dean of Sciences. Under Medicine: Cardiology Lab, Oncology Lab. Under Engineering: Biomedical Engineering, AI Lab. Under Sciences: Neuroscience Center, Genomics Institute.
qualityCriteria: Items present (Vice President, Medicine, Engineering, Sciences, Cardiology, Oncology, Biomedical, AI Lab, Neuroscience)
Description for each item is present
No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
napkinBenchmark: Tree diagram with VP at top, three deans below, and specialized labs/centers at the bottom tier. Connecting lines show reporting relationships.

data.title: University Research Institute Organization

items.label: Vice President of Research
items.description: Oversees all research activities across the university

items.label: Dean of Medicine
items.description: Leads medical and clinical research programs

items.label: Dean of Engineering
items.description: Directs engineering and technology research divisions

items.label: Dean of Sciences
items.description: Manages basic science and interdisciplinary programs

items.label: Oncology Lab
items.description: Cancer biology, immunotherapy, and targeted therapies

items.label: Biomedical Engineering
items.description: Medical devices, tissue engineering, and biomaterials

items.label: AI Lab
items.description: Machine learning applications in healthcare and science

items.label: Neuroscience Center
items.description: Brain imaging, cognitive neuroscience, and neural circuits

data.caption: Organizational structure showing research reporting relationships
